rulings.Case Title: CRISTOBAL HERNANDEZ VS. CITIMORTGAGE, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Citimortgage, Inc., Ce Title Services, Inc., And U.S. Bank National Association'S Motion To Dismiss The Action For Failure To Prosecute
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 17, 2013, line 1 - Defendants Citimortgage, Inc., Ce Title Services, Inc., And U.S. Bank National Association'S Motion To Dismiss The Action For Failure To Prosecute. Defendants' Motion to Dismiss for Failure to Prosecute is GRANTED pursuant to CCP 581. Plaintiff failed to file amended complaint by 1/30/2013. Complaint is dismissed with prejudice. Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with tentative ruling. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NAVEEN SINGHA VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 17, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.,'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Third Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. No Opposition Filed. Malcolm Cisneros Law Corporation is again ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. (See 2/2/2012 Ruling). Failure to comply with SFLR for the third time will result in matters ordered off calendar. Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with tentative ruling. =(501/ERQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1369 HYDE STREET, LTD VS. WILLIAM B. REILLY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Form Interrogatory 17.1 And For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $5537.50
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 17, 2013, line 3 - PLAINTIFF 1369 HYDE STREET, LTD's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Form Interrogatory 17.1 And For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $5537.50. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Special Interrogatories and Form Interrogatory 17.1 is GRANTED. Defendants shall provide responses corresponding to each request for admissions and responding to each subsection. Sanctions granted in the amount of $5,537.50. Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with tentative ruling. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1369 HYDE STREET, LTD VS. WILLIAM B. REILLY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defts In The Amount Of $1780.00
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 17, 2013, line 3 - PLAINTIFF 1369 HYDE STREET, LTD's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defts In The Amount Of $1780.00. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Requests for Admissions is GRANTED. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,780. Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with tentative ruling. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM STEVENS et al VS. THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 17, 2013, line 4 - PLAINTIFF WILLIAM STEVENS and JASMINE MCFADDEN's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. Motion for Withdrawal of Attorney of Record is GRANTED. Court finds good cause. Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with tentative ruling. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHUI YUK CHAN et al VS. SHI YEE KWONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 17, 2013, line 5 - DEFENDANT JASON KWONG's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint is GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts in good faith showing fraud, malice or oppression; and to allege contract providing for attorney's fees. Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with tentative ruling. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PROPERTIES 2000, INC. VS. MICHAEL COMERFORD et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 17, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT MICHAEL COMERFORD's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurer to First Amended Complaint is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges agent's standing to sue pursuant to written authority; Defendant cites no authority supporting his argument that mention of "tremble rents" invalidates the notice or renders it uncertain. Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with tentative ruling. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RITA L. STEIN VS. SIMON HALTEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Andm Motion To Deem All Requests For Admissions Admitted; To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatiries; To Deem All Objections Waived And For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1277.50 To Deft Vera Arbid
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 17, 2013, line 7 - PLAINTIFF RITA STEIN's Motion To Deem All Requests For Admissions Admitted; To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatiries; To Deem All Objections Waived And For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1277.50 To Deft Vera Arbid. Plaintiff's Motion to Deem Requests for Admissions Admitted, to Compel Responses to special Interrogatories as to Vera Arbid Hearing Required to address whether discovery was excessive and burdensome re: 107 Special Interrogatories in non-payment case. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RITA L. STEIN VS. SIMON HALTEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem All Requests For Admissions Admitted; To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories; Tro Deem All Objections Waiverd; And For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1277.50 To Deft Simon Halteh
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 17, 2013, line 7 - PLAINTIFF RITA STEIN's Motion To Deem All Requests For Admissions Admitted; To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories; Tro Deem All Objections Waiverd; And For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1277.50 To Defendant Simon Halteh. Plaintiff's Motion to Deem Requests for Admissions Admitted, to Compel Responses to special Interrogatories as to Simon Halteh. Hearing Required to address whether discovery was excessive and burdensome re: 107 Special Interrogatories in non-payment case. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP VS. CHARLES BYRD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 17, 2013, line 8 - DEFENDANT CHARLES BYRD's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is DENIED. Opposing party presents competent evidence of due diligence and posting. Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with tentative ruling. =(501/ERQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELO WILSON VS. PHILLIP GARCIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons/First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 17, 2013, line 9 - DEFENDANT PHILLIP GARCIA's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons/First Amended Complaint. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is GRANTED with leave to amend to attach house rules or to allege that such rules are oral. Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with tentative ruling. =(501/REQ)
